sections.chapter_title: Eligibility to Apply a Matching Adjustment

rules.summary: A firm must not apply a matching adjustment to the relevant risk-free interest rate term structure to calculate the best estimate of its insurance or reinsurance obligations unless it has a matching a
The conditions referred to in regulation 4(11) of the IRPR regulations are:

For the purposes of this Part, the insurance or reinsurance obligations of an insurance or reinsurance contract must not be split into different parts when composing the relevant portfolio of insuranc

A firm that applies the matching adjustment to a relevant portfolio of insurance or reinsurance obligations must not revert back to the approach that does not include a matching adjustment.

sections.chapter_title: Additions to the Fundamental Spread in Respect of Assets with Cash-Flows that are Highly Predictable

sections.chapter_title: On-Going Compliance with Matching Adjustment Eligibility Conditions

rules.summary: This Chapter applies to a firm that has been granted a matching adjustment permission.

A firm with a matching adjustment permission must comply with the matching adjustment eligibility conditions and the terms of its matching adjustment permission, including any applicable exposure limi

A firm that applies the matching adjustment to a relevant portfolio of insurance or reinsurance obligations must not apply a risk-free interest rate transitional measure or volatility adjustment in re
Where a firm that applies the matching adjustment is no longer able to comply with the matching adjustment eligibility conditions, it must immediately:

Where a firm is not able to restore compliance with the matching adjustment eligibility conditions within two months of the date of non-compliance it must then, on a monthly basis and for the duration

sections.chapter_title: Eligibility to use the Matching Adjustment Investment Accelerator

rules.summary: A firm with a matching adjustment permission must not include any new assets in its relevant portfolio of assets unless it has a MAIA permission.

sections.chapter_title: Use of the Matching Adjustment Investment Accelerator

rules.summary: This Chapter applies to a firm that has been granted both a matching adjustment permission and a MAIA permission.
A firm must not include a new asset in its relevant portfolio of assets unless it is a qualifying new asset.
If a firm includes a non-qualifying new asset in its relevant portfolio of assets, the firm must inform the PRA and take the necessary measures to remove that asset as soon as possible.

A firm must comply with the terms of its MAIA permission, including any applicable MAIA exposure limit, at all times and (without limiting the generality of [13.2](/pra-rules/matching-adjustment#e08a9
If a  firm breaches any applicable MAIA exposure limit, it must inform the PRA and take the necessary measures to restore compliance with the MAIA exposure limit as soon as possible.
